heading: Repealed. , ,Pub. L. 98–242, title I, § 110(a)98 Stat. 101Mar. 22, 1984
label: 7811 to 7819 Repealed. , ,Pub. L. 98–242, title I, § 110(a)98 Stat. 101Mar. 22, 1984
notes: Section 7811, , , , related to establishment of research and technology institutes.Pub. L. 95–467, title I, § 10192 Stat. 1306Oct. 17, 1978

Section 7812, , , , authorized use of appropriated funds for printing and publishing of program results, and planning, coordinating, and conducting of cooperative research.Pub. L. 95–467, title I, § 10292 Stat. 1307Oct. 17, 1978

Section 7813, , , , set out responsibilities of Secretary of the Interior in prescribing procedures, rules, and regulations, and in developing a 5-year water resource research program.Pub. L. 95–467, title I, § 10392 Stat. 1308Oct. 17, 1978

Section 7814, , , , related to non-impairment of legal relationship between State governments and educational institutions involved in water research and to prohibition with regard to any Federal control of educational institutions.Pub. L. 95–467, title I, § 10492 Stat. 1308Oct. 17, 1978
Section 7815, , , , provided for making of grants and contracts.Pub. L. 95–467, title I, § 10592 Stat. 1308Oct. 17, 1978
Section 7816, , , , set out range of program issues and provided for due consideration to be given to priority problems.Pub. L. 95–467, title I, § 10692 Stat. 1309Oct. 17, 1978
Section 7817, , , , defined “State”.Pub. L. 95–467, title I, § 10792 Stat. 1309Oct. 17, 1978
Section 7818, , , , authorized advance payment of initial expenses.Pub. L. 95–467, title I, § 10892 Stat. 1309Oct. 17, 1978
Section 7819, , , , provided for study and design of water resources programs and activities and for reports to Congress.Pub. L. 95–467, title I, § 10992 Stat. 1309Oct. 17, 1978
For similar provisions, see section 10301 et seq. of this title.
